title: hortensia serrata
intro: Hortensia serrata, also known as Hydrangea serrata, is a species of flowering plant in the family Hydrangeaceae, native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with its roots, stems, and flowers possessing anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hortensia serrata include reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and supporting kidney function, making it a valuable remedy in Eastern herbal medicine. In herbal preparations, Hortensia serrata is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
